loc.syn: Televisi Republik Indonesia (TVRI) is a national public television network in Indonesia. TVRI has the status of a Public Broadcasting Institution along with Radio Republik Indonesia (RRI), which is stipulated by law.

Tayangan konten yang sarat akan pesan cinta kasih yang membawa keharmonisan, ketentraman, dan kehidupan yang bebas bencana.

It delivers fresh reports on national and international events, economics, sports, and lifestyle, presented in an informative and up-to-date format to help viewers start their day well-informed.
The program covers various engaging topics such as lifestyle, entertainment, health, and uplifting personal stories, presented in a relaxed and friendly atmosphere.
Through reconstructions, exclusive interviews, and in-depth investigations, the show reveals hidden facts behind mysterious events.
Through reconstructions, exclusive interviews, and in-depth investigations, the show reveals hidden facts behind mysterious events.
Each episode highlights spontaneous reactions, hilarious actions, and unique situations that entertain viewers while keeping things relatable.
Each episode highlights spontaneous reactions, hilarious actions, and unique situations that entertain viewers while keeping things relatable.

Kids from different age groups showcase their strength, speed, and agility as they attempt to conquer a series of challenging physical obstacles. Each episode highlights intense matchups, determination, and the inspiring journey of young ninjas striving to advance and claim victory.
Each episode features a new story that is both entertaining and educational, with interactive moments that invite children to guess, sing, and share in the joy with the characters.

In a big city where various vehicles happily coexist, the little bus Tayo has just started learning his route around town. There are many things for Tayo to learn. Tayo and his friends, Rogi, Lani, and Gani, help each other to become great grown-up buses.

Katuri is an exciting show about four peacock chicks growing up in a natural forest under the gentle care and affection of Mother Flora. Mother Flora always encourages her children to explore the world with other animals and helps them whenever they need it. When the peacock chicks encounter difficulties or even danger, Mother Flora is always there to keep them safe.

Pororo the little penguin and his friends live in a peaceful land covered in snow and ice. They all have different personalities and interests, which sometimes cause a little trouble in their quiet winter world. But together, every day is an adventure where they learn all of life's lessons, big and small!

In the underwater world, a mermaid named Purple longs for adventures on land and secretly takes a huge risk by transforming herself into a human. With the help of Pink Star, the sleeping guardian fairy of the bubblegem, Purple transforms. However, the excessive use of magic causes the bubblegem, their source of power, to shatter and scatter across the land. To gather the scattered bubblegems, the sea queen White Gold commands seven mermaids from different sea kingdoms.

Bluey is an Australian animated series that follows the daily adventures of a six-year-old blue heeler puppy named Bluey. Together with her younger brother, Bingo, and her parents, Bandit and Chilli, Bluey engages in imaginative games that spark curiosity and creativity.

A simple family from the big city decides to leave the glitz and glamour of urban life behind and return to the village for the sake of their child, who is afraid to go to school. In the village, they interact with friends, neighbors, and local animals, causing endless awkward and funny situations. However, amid all the silliness, there are also touching moments of togetherness, where laughter and tears go hand in hand. Tiantian, the six-year-old child, full of curiosity and love for the world, begins to develop into a healthy, independent, and confident person amidst the beauty of the countryside.

Abang l the explorer is a variety show that provides entertainment and education. Abang l will invite viewers to play and learn things that are appropriate for his age, with different topics in each episode. Abang L's funny antics, charm, and energy will bring this program to life. The articulate Abang L will ask questions to people around him. He will also try out several professions with the aim of educating viewers about each role.

Let's get to know Bing, a cute and curious little rabbit! Together with his beloved adult friend, Flop, Bing always finds exciting new things every day. From playing with bubbles, tying shoelaces, to overcoming sadness, everything becomes a fun adventure! Come on, follow the adventures of Bing and his friends! We can learn many things while laughing, you know!

FOLLOW THE EXCITING ADVENTURES OF PAK SOMAT'S FAMILY AS THEY STARTED A NEW LIFE IN CITEKO! FROM BUILDING BU INAH'S DREAM STORE, THE EXCITEMENT OF BEING NEIGHBORS WITH CEU KOKOM, TO PAK SOMAT'S STRUGGLE TO BECOME AN ONLINE MOTORCYCLE TAXI FOR THE SAKE OF HIS FAMILY. A WARM STORY FULL OF LAUGHTER AND A MORAL MESSAGE SUITABLE FOR ALL AGES.
What's happening in the world today? All the events and tragedies currently happening around the world will be summarized clearly and up-to-date. Only on Net TV!
Fakta +62 is a morning and afternoon news program that broadcasts information about events, politics, crime, culinary and tourism.
The latest program from Net TV that presents sensational stories from celebrity circles.

A brave, poor young girl is welcomed into a rich family and develops a romance with their misogynist youngest son, driving a woman already in love with him to go to great lengths to destroy their relationship.
Mischa rises to spread terror, Farrel slowly remembers his past, and Fitri must go undercover to save lives.
Net TV's latest culinary program that will tempt every corner of the globe!
Makan Enak is a program that presents a collection of videos from Indonesian and foreign food vloggers about food menus, places to eat, or about unique and definitely delicious ways to eat food.
MASAK GESSS!!!A simple yet delicious regional culinary adventure.
Amigos X Siempre "Friends For Ever" A group of children form a special friendship, using music as a bond.
Love story between Esmeralda, a poor blind woman, and Jose Armando, a doctor from a rich family.
